description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and build. In the test stage add a test job that uses the registry.gitlab.com/musit-norway/docker-scala-sbt image, runs a postgres:latest service and an elasticsearch service (aliased as elasticsearch), sets ELASTICSEARCH_HOST, ELASTICSEARCH_PORT, MUSIT_FUTURE_INTERVAL, MUSIT_FUTURE_TIMEOUT, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD and SYMBIOTIC_POSTGRES_HOST variables, and executes the script steps: echo "Building and running tests...", sbt clean scalastyle scalafmt, git status, git diff --exit-code || (echo "ERROR Scala formatting check failed, see differences above."; false), and a conditional block that runs sbt coverage allTests:test coverageReport; sbt coverageAggregate; sbt codacyCoverage when CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN is set, otherwise runs sbt allTests:test. In the build stage add a build job that runs only on the master branch of MUSIT-Norway/musit, uses the $MUSIT_DOCKER_REGISTRY/musit/docker-scala-sbt image with a $MUSIT_DOCKER_REGISTRY/library/docker:dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay, runs before_script commands: echo "Running build $CI_JOB_ID for commit $CI_COMMIT_SHA with commit ref name $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME", mkdir $HOME/.docker, echo $DOCKER_AUTH_CONFIG > $HOME/.docker/config.json, docker info, and then runs sbt docker:publish. Configure a cache for the path "cache" with untracked files, and define global variables COURSIER_CACHE=/root/cache/coursier and DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay.
